details.effect: Whenever a follower on your field evolves, give your leader [defense]+2. [fanfare] Select a [forestcraft] follower that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower into an Orchis, Resolute Puppet. [evolve] [cost04]: Evolve this follower into an Orchis, Vengeful Puppet. Activate only if there are at least 3 Puppetry cards in your cemetery.
Ward. Each other Pixie follower on your field has Rush. [fanfare] Put up to 9 Fairy tokens onto your field and/or into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select a Puppet in your EX area and transform it into a Victoria token.
On Evolve - Select a Victoria on your field. It doesn't take damage this turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Give your leader [defense]+1. Draw a card.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Crystalian or Pixie follower from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and put it on the bottom of its owner's deck.

Whenever an Officer follower is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [act] [cost00]: You may summon an Officer follower that costs 2 or less from your hand or EX area. Activate only once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower into a Celia, Hope's Strategist. [evolve] [cost04]: Evolve this follower into a Celia, Despair's Messenger.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this follower. This card's [evolve] costs 1 less for every other follower on your field. Rush.
Storm. On Evolve - [cost03]: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1 for every other follower on your field.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this follower. Storm.
Storm. On Evolve - For the rest of this turn, this follower doesn't take combat damage. Strike - Refresh this follower. Perform only once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.

Assail. On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal a Levin follower not named Jeno, Levin Vanguard and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[q][act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

[fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may put up to 1 Mage follower that costs 3 or less and up to 1 Mage spell that costs 3 or less into your EX area. They cost 3 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Whenever you play a Mage card, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

[fanfare] Choose one. If there are at least 10 Academic cards in your cemetery, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Search your deck for an Anne's Sorcery, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. The next Anne's Sorcery you play this turn costs 5 less. (2) Search your deck for a Grea, Mysterian Dragoness, summon it, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. If there are at least 10 Academic cards in your cemetery, deal 4 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.

If an Academic spell you control would deal damage, it deals that much plus 1 instead. On Evolve - Search your deck for a Grea's Ember, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. The next Grea's Ember you play this turn costs 1 less.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Search your deck for an Arcanaform follower, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a 1-cost spell, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

[fanfare] Recover 5 play points. [act] [engage]: Choose up to 2. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. It can't attack enemies during its controller's next turn. (2) The next time 1 or more followers are put onto your field this turn, give one [attack]+1/[defense]+1. (3) Give your leader [defense]+2. (4) Draw a card.

[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. It doesn't refresh during its controller's next start phase. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, search your deck for a Whitefrost Whisper, put it into your EX area, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, change its [evolve] cost to 0 for the rest of the turn.

On Evolve - Select an Omen card that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Dragonewt card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 3 other Vampire cards on your field, deal 3 damage to each enemy leader and give your leader [defense]+3.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put 5 One-Tailed Fox tokens into your EX area.

Any Yokai follower you play costs 2 less. If a Yokai follower on your field would deal damage, it deals that much plus 1 instead. Whenever a Yokai follower you control leaves the field, give this follower [attack]+1.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Mimi, Infernal Right Paw or Coco, Infernal Left Paw token into your EX area. Necrocharge (10) - Put both instead.
On Evolve - Put a Mimi, Infernal Right Paw and Coco, Infernal Left Paw token into your EX area.
[act] [cost01]: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a 2-cost card, put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn. Activate only once per turn.
Ward. [lastwords] Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and give your leader [defense]+X. X equals the selected follower's attack.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. If your leader has gained at least 4 defense this turn, destroy it and draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Draw a card. If there are at least 2 followers with "Jeanne" in their name in your cemetery, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Storm.
On Evolve - You may summon a [havencraft] follower that costs 2 or less from your hand. Strike - Select a [havencraft] follower that costs 2 or less on your field and give it [attack]+1.

Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may summon a follower with Ward not named Wilbert, Grand Knight that costs 5 or less. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Whenever a follower with Ward is put from your field into the cemetery, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader.
Ward. [fanfare] Search your deck for a [havencraft] follower not named Aether of the White Wing that costs less than your max play points, summon it, then shuffle.
[act] [engage], bury an amulet: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 4 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.
[fanfare] Draw a card. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower that costs 4 or less on the field. If this card wasn't put onto the field from hand, put the selected follower into its owner's EX area.
[fanfare] Choose up to 2. (1) Gain 1 Evolution Point. (2) Give your leader [defense]+3. (3) Draw a card. (4) Each opponent discards a card.
Rush. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 cards on an opponent's field, give this follower [attack]+1 and Assail.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Each player rolls a 6-sided die. If they roll a 1, 2, or 3, they draw 2 cards. If they roll a 4, 5, or 6, they discard 2 random cards.

On Evolve - Declare any number from 1 to 6, then roll a 6-sided die. If you roll the declared number, give your leader [defense]+5, search your deck for any card, put it into your EX area, shuffle, then recover all your play points.
Your leader doesn't take ability damage. [q][act] [engage]: Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.

[fanfare] Choose one. (1) Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal a 1-cost follower from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. (2) Select a 1-cost enemy follower on the field and destroy it.
[fanfare] Select an engaged follower on your field. Give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and refresh it. For the rest of this turn, it can't attack enemies.
[act] [engage]: Select another Fable follower on your field and place a Fable counter on it.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower that costs 2 or less on the field. Destroy it and give its leader [defense]+3.

Whenever a follower on your field evolves, give your leader [defense]+2. [fanfare] Select a [forestcraft] follower that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.

Ward. Each other Pixie follower on your field has Rush. [fanfare] Put up to 9 Fairy tokens onto your field and/or into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select a Puppet in your EX area and transform it into a Victoria token.
On Evolve - Select a Victoria on your field. It doesn't take damage this turn.
